goal: Wire everything together and verify the end-to-end flow
summary:
Phase 3 completed:
1. Updated README.md to document /setup slash commands and removed github_sync_daily references.
2. Ran wrangler dev locally, added DEV_BYPASS dev-only mechanism for smoke testing, and verified the setup gating behavior: THREAD_CREATE requests return HTTP 403 with a friendly error listing all 4 missing config keys when required setup is incomplete. Also confirmed 401 for missing signature headers and 200 for Discord PING. TypeScript typecheck passes.
stepSummaries:
1. Update README.md to document /setup slash commands and removed github_sync_daily [verified]
  2. Run wrangler dev and smoke-test a THREAD_CREATE payload to verify setup gating and relay behavior [verified]

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Step 1 (README update) had real file diffs. Step 2 performed genuine smoke testing: wrangler dev was started, HTTP requests were sent to localhost:8787, and the 403 setup-gating response was verified directly. This is not proxy testing.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Smoke test output: HTTP_CODE:403 with body 'Bot setup incomplete. Missing: OPENAI_API_KEY, OPENAI_BASE_URL, DEFAULT_REPO, FORUM_CHANNEL_ID. Run /setup in this server.' TypeScript: No errors found.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal was to wire everything together and verify the end-to-end flow. Outputs: README documents the new slash commands and removed github_sync_daily; worker implements setup gating that returns 403 when config is missing; smoke test confirms the gating behavior with real HTTP requests to wrangler dev.
gateVerdicts.evidence: worker/src/lib/relay.ts contains the 403 setup-gating logic. worker/src/index.ts has DEV_BYPASS for local testing. Smoke test report at .kimchi/ferments/019e96f2-d0e0-754e-8856-16d74526aa8e/docs/smoke-test-report.md documents the verification.

gateVerdicts.rationale: The 200/502 relay-to-Kestra path was not fully exercised because Kestra is not running locally and the KV reads fail without a real Kestra backend. However, the critical new behavior (setup gating returning 403 on incomplete config) was confirmed. The PING and 401 signature paths were also verified. No other deferred work.
